description: While adding fz2 fixture-matrix paths in fz-rh2.11.6, case_tuple_pattern_sequential could not be used as the fz2 case/with representative because old fz paths emit expected type/no-matching-clause warnings for partial case/with, while fz2/compiler2 currently emits no diagnostics. Keep case_tuple_pattern_sequential as the old diagnostic oracle and use case_with_total for fz2 parity now. Follow-up goal: make compiler2 source/body analysis emit the same warning facts/diagnostics for partial case and with clauses, then consider adding fz2-* paths back to the partial diagnostic fixture.
title: Compiler2 diagnostics: emit type/no-matching-clause for partial case/with
